name: responsive-ui-inputs
description: Validate safe-area HUD, game menu, contextual controls, equipped gauntlet, and keyboard/gamepad bindings.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD",5) local cas=game:GetService("ContextActionService") local bindings=cas:GetAllBoundActionInfo() local character=p.Character or p.CharacterAdded:Wait() return H:JSONEncode({safeInsets=g.ScreenInsets==Enum.ScreenInsets.CoreUISafeInsets,safeCompatibility=g.SafeAreaCompatibility==Enum.SafeAreaCompatibility.None,clipSafe=g.ClipToDeviceSafeArea,stats=g:FindFirstChild("StatsPanel")~=nil,objective=g:FindFirstChild("ObjectiveCard")~=nil,menu=g:FindFirstChild("GameMenu")~=nil,context=g:FindFirstChild("ContextTarget")~=nil,gauntlet=character:FindFirstChild("Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet")~=nil,punchBinding=bindings.KaijuPunch~=nil,trainBinding=bindings.KaijuTrain~=nil,useBinding=bindings.KaijuUse~=nil,menuBinding=bindings.KaijuMenu~=nil})

steps.label: responsive UI and input bindings exist

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.GameMenu.Visible=true game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").PunchWallEvents.ActionRequest:FireServer({action="RequestSync"}) task.wait(.25) local tabs=g.GameMenu.Tabs local content=g.GameMenu.Content return H:JSONEncode({visible=g.GameMenu.Visible,fists=tabs:FindFirstChild("FistsTab")~=nil,pets=tabs:FindFirstChild("PetsTab")~=nil,tasks=tabs:FindFirstChild("TasksTab")~=nil,settings=tabs:FindFirstChild("SettingsTab")~=nil,rows=#content:GetChildren()>=3})
